title: Diabetes Type 2 daily coaching starter protocol
summary: Starter protocol for meal consistency, glucose logging, medication adherence reminders, and red-flag routing.
content: Use this only as a seed protocol. Full production guidance must be backed by reviewed source chunks. Coach the user on routine, logging, meal timing, and when to contact a clinician. Do not prescribe or change medication.
rules: Ask about last meal timing before food advice.
Encourage glucose logs if user already tracks blood sugar.
Send urgent safety message for severe symptoms or very abnormal user-reported readings.

evidence.note: Seed provenance. Replace with reviewed extracted chunk before clinical launch.

title: Blood pressure daily coaching starter protocol
summary: Starter protocol for BP logs, sodium awareness, medicine routine prompts, stress breaks, and urgent symptom routing.
content: Use this only as a seed protocol. Ask for reading context, avoid diagnosis, support adherence to clinician plan, and escalate red-flag symptoms.
rules: Ask when BP was measured and whether user was resting.
Escalate chest pain, severe headache, weakness, confusion, or breathing difficulty.

evidence.note: Seed provenance. Replace with reviewed extracted chunk before clinical launch.

title: Weight management Indian meal starter protocol
summary: Starter protocol for protein-forward meals, hydration reminders, calorie-awareness language, and Indian food substitutions.
content: Use this only as a seed protocol. Keep advice practical, culturally local, non-shaming, and focused on routine consistency. Do not recommend extreme restriction.
rules: Ask food preference before meal plan.
Prefer protein plus fiber in meals.

evidence.note: Seed provenance. Replace with reviewed extracted chunk before clinical launch.

title: Fitness safe progression starter protocol
summary: Starter protocol for safe activity progression, recovery checks, and injury-aware coaching.
content: Use this only as a seed protocol. Encourage gradual progression, rest days, and symptom-aware exercise boundaries. Do not override medical restrictions.
rules: Start with low-risk activity if user is inactive.
Escalate chest pain, fainting, severe breathlessness, or injury symptoms.

evidence.note: Seed provenance. Replace with reviewed extracted chunk before clinical launch.
